connectors.name: OneDrive
connectors.appDescription: Sync files and folders from OneDrive

fields.name: clientId
fields.placeholder: Enter your Azure AD Application ID
fields.description: The Application (Client) ID from Azure AD App Registration

fields.name: clientSecret
fields.placeholder: Enter your Azure AD Client Secret
fields.description: The Client Secret from Azure AD App Registration

fields.name: tenantId
fields.placeholder: Enter your Azure AD Tenant ID
fields.description: The Directory (Tenant) ID from Azure AD

fields.name: hasAdminConsent
fields.description: Check if admin consent has been granted for the application

fields.name: redirectUri
fields.description: The redirect URI for OAuth authentication

fields.name: modified
fields.description: Filter files and folders by modification date.

fields.name: created
fields.description: Filter files and folders by creation date.

fields.name: file_extensions
fields.description: Filter files by extension (e.g., pdf, docx, txt). Leave empty to sync all files.

fields.name: enable_manual_sync
fields.description: Disable automatic indexing for all synced records.

fields.name: shared
fields.description: Enable indexing of shared items

connectors.name: SharePoint Online
connectors.appDescription: Sync documents and lists from SharePoint Online

fields.name: clientId
fields.placeholder: Enter your Azure AD Application ID
fields.description: The Application (Client) ID from Azure AD App Registration

fields.name: tenantId
fields.placeholder: Enter your Azure AD Tenant ID
fields.description: The Directory (Tenant) ID from Azure AD

fields.name: hasAdminConsent
fields.description: Check if admin consent has been granted for the application

fields.name: sharepointDomain
fields.description: Your SharePoint domain URL

fields.name: site_ids
fields.description: Filter specific sites by name.

fields.name: page_ids
fields.description: Filter specific pages by name.

fields.name: drive_ids
fields.description: Filter specific document libraries by name.

fields.name: file_extensions
fields.description: Filter files by extension (e.g., pdf, docx, txt). Leave empty to sync all files.

fields.name: modified
fields.description: Filter pages and blogposts by modification date.

fields.name: created
fields.description: Filter pages and blogposts by creation date.

fields.name: enable_manual_sync
fields.description: Disable automatic indexing for all synced records.

fields.name: pages
fields.description: Enable indexing of pages

fields.name: documents
fields.description: Enable indexing of documents

connectors.name: Outlook
connectors.appDescription: Sync emails from Outlook

fields.name: clientId
fields.placeholder: Enter your Azure AD Application ID
fields.description: The Application (Client) ID from Azure AD App Registration

fields.name: clientSecret
fields.placeholder: Enter your Azure AD Client Secret
fields.description: The Client Secret from Azure AD App Registration

fields.name: tenantId
fields.placeholder: Enter your Azure AD Tenant ID
fields.description: The Directory (Tenant) ID from Azure AD

fields.name: hasAdminConsent
fields.description: Check if admin consent has been granted for the application

fields.name: redirectUri
fields.description: The redirect URI for OAuth authentication

fields.name: folders
fields.description: Select standard Outlook folders to sync emails from.

fields.name: custom_folders
fields.description: Include custom/non-standard email folders

fields.name: received_date
fields.description: Filter emails by received date. Defaults to last 60 days.

fields.name: enable_manual_sync
fields.description: Disable automatic indexing for all synced records.

fields.name: mails
fields.description: Enable indexing of email messages

fields.name: attachments
fields.description: Enable indexing of email attachments

fields.name: group_conversations
fields.description: Enable indexing of Microsoft 365 group conversations

connectors.name: Confluence
connectors.appDescription: Sync pages, spaces, and users from Confluence Cloud

fields.name: clientId
fields.description: The OAuth2 client ID from Atlassian OAuth App

fields.name: clientSecret
fields.description: The OAuth2 client secret from Atlassian OAuth App

fields.name: space_keys
fields.description: Filter pages and blogposts by space name

fields.name: page_ids
fields.description: Filter specific pages by their name.

fields.name: blogpost_ids
fields.description: Filter specific blogposts by their name.

fields.name: modified
fields.description: Filter pages and blogposts by modification date.

fields.name: created
fields.description: Filter pages and blogposts by creation date.

fields.name: enable_manual_sync
fields.description: Disable automatic indexing for all synced records.

fields.name: pages
fields.description: Enable indexing of pages

fields.name: page_attachments
fields.description: Enable indexing of page attachments

fields.name: page_comments
fields.description: Enable indexing of page comments

fields.name: blogposts
fields.description: Enable indexing of blogposts

fields.name: blogpost_attachments
fields.description: Enable indexing of blogpost attachments

fields.name: blogpost_comments
fields.description: Enable indexing of blogpost comments

connectors.connectorInfo: ⚠️ Important: In order for users to get access to Confluence data, each user needs to make their email visible in their Confluence account settings. Users can do this by going to their Confluence profile settings and switching email visibility to Public.

connectors.name: Jira
connectors.appDescription: Sync issues from Jira Cloud

fields.name: clientId
fields.placeholder: Enter your Atlassian Cloud Application ID
fields.description: The Application (Client) ID from Atlassian Developer Console

fields.name: clientSecret
fields.placeholder: Enter your Atlassian Cloud Client Secret
fields.description: The Client Secret from Atlassian Developer Console

fields.name: project_keys
fields.description: Filter issues by project keys (e.g., PROJ1, PROJ2)

fields.name: modified
fields.description: Filter issues by modification date.

fields.name: created
fields.description: Filter issues by creation date.

fields.name: enable_manual_sync
fields.description: Disable automatic indexing for all synced records.

fields.name: issues
fields.description: Enable indexing of issues

fields.name: issue_attachments
fields.description: Enable indexing of issue attachments

connectors.connectorInfo: ⚠️ Important: In order for users to get access to Jira data, each user needs to make their email visible in their Jira account settings. Users can do this by going to their Jira profile settings and switching email visibility to Public.

connectors.name: ServiceNow
connectors.appDescription: Sync knowledge base articles, categories, and permissions from ServiceNow

fields.name: instanceUrl
fields.description: Your ServiceNow instance URL (e.g., https://dev12345.service-now.com)

fields.name: authorizeUrl
fields.description: Your ServiceNow authorize URL (e.g., https://dev12345.service-now.com/oauth_auth.do)

fields.name: tokenUrl
fields.description: Your ServiceNow token URL (e.g., https://dev12345.service-now.com/oauth_token.do)

fields.name: clientId
fields.description: The OAuth2 client ID from ServiceNow OAuth Application Registry

fields.name: clientSecret
fields.description: The OAuth2 client secret from ServiceNow OAuth Application Registry

connectors.name: Web
connectors.appDescription: Crawl and sync data from web pages

customFields.name: url
customFields.description: The URL of the website to crawl (e.g., https://example.com)

customFields.name: type
customFields.description: Choose whether to crawl a single page or recursively crawl linked pages

customFields.name: depth
customFields.description: Maximum depth for recursive crawling (1-10, only applies to recursive type)

customFields.name: max_pages
customFields.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl (1-1000)

connectors.name: RSS
connectors.appDescription: Subscribe to and sync content from RSS and Atom feeds

customFields.name: feed_urls
customFields.description: RSS or Atom feed URLs, separated by commas or newlines (e.g., https://blog.example.com/rss, https://news.ycombinator.com/rss)

customFields.name: max_articles_per_feed
customFields.description: Maximum number of articles to process per feed (1-500)

customFields.name: fetch_full_content
customFields.description: Crawl each article URL for full content. If disabled, only the feed summary/description is indexed.

connectors.name: BookStack
connectors.appDescription: Sync content from your BookStack instance

fields.name: base_url
fields.description: The base URL of your BookStack instance

fields.name: token_id
fields.description: The Token ID generated from your BookStack profile

fields.name: token_secret
fields.description: The Token Secret generated from your BookStack profile

fields.name: modified
fields.description: Filter content by modification date.

fields.name: created
fields.description: Filter content by creation date.

fields.name: book_ids
fields.description: Filter content by book names. Display: Name (slug)

fields.name: enable_manual_sync
fields.description: Disable automatic indexing for all synced records.
